title: RocketPD Instructor Detail

fields.label: Name
fields.name: rpd_instructor_name
fields.instructions: Optional display name. If blank, the post title or fallback instructor name is used.

fields.label: Authority Headline
fields.name: rpd_instructor_authority
fields.default_value: Rethinking teacher supervision, coaching, and evaluation so leaders can build trust and improve practice.
fields.instructions: Main authority/dek text in the hero. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Tags
fields.name: rpd_instructor_tags
fields.instructions: Legacy fallback/override. Preferred source for tags is the Learning Topic taxonomy assigned to this instructor. Leave blank to use assigned Learning Topic terms or default fallback tags.

fields.label: Headshot
fields.name: rpd_instructor_headshot
fields.instructions: Portrait used in the hero. If blank, the fallback image or initials treatment is used. Leave blank to use the instructor fallback copy.

fields.label: Hero Eyebrow
fields.name: rpd_instructor_hero_eyebrow
fields.instructions: Leave blank to use the instructor fallback copy.

fields.label: Hero Primary CTA Label
fields.name: rpd_instructor_hero_primary_label
fields.instructions: Leave blank to use the instructor fallback copy.

fields.label: Hero Primary CTA URL
fields.name: rpd_instructor_hero_primary_href
fields.instructions: Can be a page URL or an anchor such as #free-resources. Leave blank to use the fallback anchor.

fields.label: Hero Secondary CTA Label
fields.name: rpd_instructor_hero_secondary_label
fields.instructions: Leave blank to use the instructor fallback copy.

fields.label: Hero Secondary CTA URL
fields.name: rpd_instructor_hero_secondary_href
fields.instructions: Can be a page URL or an anchor such as #professional-learning. Leave blank to use the fallback anchor.

fields.label: Hero Award Text
fields.name: rpd_instructor_hero_award
fields.instructions: Leave blank to use the instructor fallback copy.

fields.label: Hero Stats
fields.name: rpd_instructor_stats
fields.instructions: Add the small hero stat tiles. Leave empty to use fallback stats. Rows with missing value or label are ignored.

fields.label: Authority Eyebrow
fields.name: rpd_instructor_bio_eyebrow
fields.instructions: Leave blank to use the instructor fallback copy.

fields.label: Authority Heading
fields.name: rpd_instructor_bio_heading
fields.instructions: Leave blank to use the instructor fallback copy.

fields.label: Focus List Heading
fields.name: rpd_instructor_authority_focus_heading
fields.instructions: Small heading above the authority checklist. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Bio Paragraphs
fields.name: rpd_instructor_bio_paragraphs
fields.instructions: Separate paragraphs with line breaks.

fields.label: Focus Areas
fields.name: rpd_instructor_focus_areas
fields.instructions: One focus area per line.

fields.label: Free Resources Eyebrow
fields.name: rpd_instructor_resources_eyebrow
fields.instructions: Small badge above the Free Resources heading. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Free Resources Heading
fields.name: rpd_instructor_resources_heading
fields.instructions: Main Free Resources heading. Leave blank to use the instructor-specific fallback heading.

fields.label: Free Resources Body
fields.name: rpd_instructor_resources_body
fields.instructions: Short supporting sentence below the Free Resources heading. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Guide Enabled
fields.name: rpd_instructor_guide_enabled
fields.instructions: Controls whether the Featured Guide card appears. Empty text fields still use fallback copy. Turn off to hide this block intentionally. Blank text fields inside enabled blocks still fall back to default copy.

fields.label: Guide Eyebrow
fields.name: rpd_instructor_guide_eyebrow
fields.instructions: Small label in the Featured Guide card. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Guide URL
fields.name: rpd_instructor_guide_href
fields.instructions: True URL for the featured guide. Leave blank to use the fallback guide URL.

fields.label: Guide Primary CTA Label
fields.name: rpd_instructor_guide_primary_cta_label
fields.instructions: Primary guide button label. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Guide Secondary CTA Label
fields.name: rpd_instructor_guide_secondary_cta_label
fields.instructions: Secondary guide button label. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Guide Deliverables
fields.name: rpd_instructor_guide_deliverables
fields.instructions: One deliverable per line. Leave blank to use fallback deliverables.

fields.label: Podcast Enabled
fields.name: rpd_instructor_podcast_enabled
fields.instructions: Controls whether the podcast card appears. Empty text fields still use fallback copy. Turn off to hide this block intentionally. Blank text fields inside enabled blocks still fall back to default copy.

fields.label: Podcast YouTube Embed ID
fields.name: rpd_instructor_podcast_embed_id
fields.instructions: YouTube video ID only, for example AME1I5sUJFQ. Leave blank to use fallback embed ID.

fields.label: Podcast URL
fields.name: rpd_instructor_podcast_href
fields.instructions: True URL for the podcast link, usually a YouTube URL. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Podcast CTA Label
fields.name: rpd_instructor_podcast_cta_label
fields.instructions: Podcast card link label. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Webinar Enabled
fields.name: rpd_instructor_webinar_enabled
fields.instructions: Controls whether the webinar card appears. Empty text fields still use fallback copy. Turn off to hide this block intentionally. Blank text fields inside enabled blocks still fall back to default copy.

fields.label: Webinar YouTube Embed ID
fields.name: rpd_instructor_webinar_embed_id
fields.instructions: YouTube video ID only, for example wIV-j4nt_ms. Leave blank to use fallback embed ID.

fields.label: Webinar URL
fields.name: rpd_instructor_webinar_href
fields.instructions: True URL for the webinar link, usually a YouTube URL. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Webinar CTA Label
fields.name: rpd_instructor_webinar_cta_label
fields.instructions: Webinar card link label. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Blog Enabled
fields.name: rpd_instructor_blog_enabled
fields.instructions: Controls whether the blog subsection appears. Empty text fields still use fallback copy. Turn off to hide this block intentionally. Blank text fields inside enabled blocks still fall back to default copy.

fields.label: Blog Eyebrow
fields.name: rpd_instructor_blog_eyebrow
fields.instructions: Small label above the blog cards. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Blog Heading
fields.name: rpd_instructor_blog_heading
fields.instructions: Heading above the blog cards. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Blog CTA Label
fields.name: rpd_instructor_blog_cta_label
fields.instructions: Section link label, for example See all articles. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Blog CTA URL
fields.name: rpd_instructor_blog_cta_url
fields.instructions: Internal or external URL for the blog section link. Leave blank to use /resources/.

fields.label: Blog Posts
fields.name: rpd_instructor_blog_posts

sub_fields.label: Excerpt
sub_fields.name: excerpt
sub_fields.instructions: Short card summary. Leave blank to omit the excerpt for this card.

sub_fields.label: URL
sub_fields.name: href
sub_fields.instructions: True URL for the article. Leave blank for an unlinked card or use Placeholder Card.

sub_fields.label: Placeholder Card
sub_fields.name: placeholder
sub_fields.instructions: Use for a dashed/coming-soon placeholder card with no link.

fields.instructions: Blog cards for the subsection. Leave empty to use fallback cards. Rows without a title are ignored.

fields.label: Playbook Enabled (Reserved)
fields.name: rpd_instructor_playbook_enabled
fields.instructions: Reserved for a future playbook block. Currently not rendered by this design. Turn off to hide this block intentionally. Blank text fields inside enabled blocks still fall back to default copy.

fields.label: Professional Learning Eyebrow
fields.name: rpd_instructor_learning_eyebrow
fields.instructions: Small badge above the Professional Learning heading. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Professional Learning Heading
fields.name: rpd_instructor_learning_heading
fields.instructions: Main Professional Learning heading. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Professional Learning Body
fields.name: rpd_instructor_learning_body
fields.instructions: Supporting copy below the Professional Learning heading. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: LaunchPad Enabled
fields.name: rpd_instructor_launchpad_enabled
fields.instructions: Turn off to hide this block intentionally. Blank text fields inside enabled blocks still fall back to default copy.

fields.label: LaunchPad Type / Eyebrow
fields.name: rpd_instructor_launchpad_type
fields.instructions: Small label above the LaunchPad card title. Leave blank to use fallback copy. Leave blank to use fallback: Self-paced.

fields.label: LaunchPad Price
fields.name: rpd_instructor_launchpad_price
fields.instructions: Leave blank to use fallback: $49.

fields.label: LaunchPad Bullets
fields.name: rpd_instructor_launchpad_bullets
fields.instructions: One bullet per line. Leave blank to use fallback bullets.

fields.label: LaunchPad URL
fields.name: rpd_instructor_launchpad_href
fields.instructions: True URL for this offering card CTA. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Cohort Enabled
fields.name: rpd_instructor_cohort_enabled
fields.instructions: Turn off to hide this block intentionally. Blank text fields inside enabled blocks still fall back to default copy.

fields.label: Cohort Type / Eyebrow
fields.name: rpd_instructor_cohort_type
fields.instructions: Small label above the cohort card title. Leave blank to use fallback copy. Leave blank to use fallback: Live-virtual cohort.

fields.label: Cohort Price
fields.name: rpd_instructor_cohort_price
fields.instructions: Leave blank to use fallback: $750.

fields.label: Cohort Badge Label
fields.name: rpd_instructor_cohort_badge
fields.instructions: Badge text for the highlighted cohort card, for example Most Popular. Leave blank to use fallback copy. Leave blank to use fallback: Most Popular.

fields.label: Feature Cohort Card
fields.name: rpd_instructor_cohort_featured
fields.instructions: Controls the highlighted/raised cohort card treatment. Default is enabled. Turning this off removes the featured visual treatment.

fields.label: Cohort Bullets
fields.name: rpd_instructor_cohort_bullets
fields.instructions: One bullet per line. Leave blank to use fallback bullets.

fields.label: Cohort URL
fields.name: rpd_instructor_cohort_href
fields.instructions: True URL for this offering card CTA. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Workshop Enabled
fields.name: rpd_instructor_workshop_enabled
fields.instructions: Turn off to hide this block intentionally. Blank text fields inside enabled blocks still fall back to default copy.

fields.label: Workshop Type / Eyebrow
fields.name: rpd_instructor_workshop_type
fields.instructions: Small label above the workshop card title. Leave blank to use fallback copy. Leave blank to use fallback: Custom district workshop.

fields.label: Workshop Price
fields.name: rpd_instructor_workshop_price
fields.instructions: Leave blank to use fallback: Inquire.

fields.label: Workshop Bullets
fields.name: rpd_instructor_workshop_bullets
fields.instructions: One bullet per line. Leave blank to use fallback bullets.

fields.label: Workshop URL
fields.name: rpd_instructor_workshop_href
fields.instructions: True URL for this offering card CTA. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Trust Quote
fields.name: rpd_instructor_trust_quote
fields.instructions: Leave blank to use the instructor fallback copy.

fields.label: Trust Person
fields.name: rpd_instructor_trust_person
fields.instructions: Leave blank to use the instructor fallback copy.

fields.label: Trust Attribution
fields.name: rpd_instructor_trust_attribution
fields.instructions: Leave blank to use the instructor fallback copy.

fields.label: Testimonial Author Image
fields.name: rpd_instructor_trust_image
fields.instructions: Optional image for the testimonial author. If blank, initials are generated from the author name.

fields.label: Trust Impact Eyebrow
fields.name: rpd_instructor_trust_impact_eyebrow
fields.instructions: Small label above the trust impact heading. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Trust Impact Heading
fields.name: rpd_instructor_trust_impact_heading
fields.instructions: Heading beside the testimonial. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Trust Impact Body
fields.name: rpd_instructor_trust_impact_body
fields.instructions: Supporting copy beside the testimonial. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Trust Stats
fields.name: rpd_instructor_trust_stats
fields.instructions: Add trust impact stat tiles. Leave empty to use fallback stats. Rows with missing value or label are ignored.

fields.label: Related Experts Eyebrow
fields.name: rpd_instructor_related_eyebrow
fields.instructions: Small label above related expert cards. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Related Experts Heading
fields.name: rpd_instructor_related_heading
fields.instructions: Heading above related expert cards. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Related Experts
fields.name: rpd_instructor_related_experts
fields.instructions: Optional manual related expert cards. Leave empty to auto-select similar published instructors and fallback experts. Rows without a name are ignored.

fields.label: Final CTA Eyebrow
fields.name: rpd_instructor_final_eyebrow
fields.instructions: Currently not displayed in this design. Preserved for compatibility with prior content.

fields.label: Final CTA Headline
fields.name: rpd_instructor_final_headline
fields.default_value: Bring Kim's work to your district.

fields.label: Primary Button URL
fields.name: rpd_instructor_final_primary_href
fields.instructions: Can be a page URL or an anchor such as #free-resources. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Secondary Button URL
fields.name: rpd_instructor_final_secondary_href
fields.instructions: Can be a page URL or an anchor. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: FAQ Heading
fields.name: rpd_instructor_faq_heading
fields.instructions: Intro heading beside the FAQ accordion. Leave blank to use instructor-specific fallback copy.

fields.label: FAQ Help Text
fields.name: rpd_instructor_faq_help_text
fields.instructions: Short text before the FAQ contact link. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: FAQ Contact Link Label
fields.name: rpd_instructor_faq_contact_label
fields.instructions: FAQ intro contact link text. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: FAQ Contact Link URL
fields.name: rpd_instructor_faq_contact_url
fields.instructions: Destination for the FAQ intro contact link. Leave blank to use /contact/.

fields.label: FAQs
fields.name: rpd_instructor_faqs
fields.instructions: FAQ accordion rows. Leave empty to use fallback FAQs. Rows require both question and answer.

description: Page-level editable fields for the RocketPD individual instructor template.
